# Autom8ion Lab

> Custom AI automation, cloud infrastructure, and cybersecurity systems engineered for measurable business ROI.

Autom8ion Lab builds bespoke AI and automation systems that transform businesses from the ground up. We engineer purpose-built solutions—not generic software—across AI agent development, workflow automation, custom LLM systems, cloud infrastructure, cybersecurity, and software development. Most custom builds launch within 30 days. Clients typically achieve 10x productivity gains and 60-90% reduction in manual tasks within 90 days of deployment.

## Services

- [AI Agent Development](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/ai-agent-development): Custom conversational AI agents—chatbots, voice assistants, and autonomous task agents—built on GPT-4 and Claude, fine-tuned on proprietary business data for lead qualification, customer support, and workflow automation. Handles up to 80% of routine inquiries automatically.
- [Custom LLM Systems](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/custom-llm-systems): Design, fine-tuning, and private deployment of large language models trained on domain-specific datasets. Includes supervised fine-tuning, RLHF, RAG systems, and on-premises deployment for complete data sovereignty. Achieves 3-5x accuracy improvement over generic AI for domain queries.
- [Workflow Automation](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/workflow-automation): End-to-end business process automation using n8n, Make, and custom Python pipelines. Connects CRMs, ERPs, databases, and SaaS tools through API integrations with complete audit trails and real-time monitoring.
- [Process Automation (RPA)](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/process-automation): Robotic Process Automation combined with AI to handle repetitive tasks across legacy systems, web interfaces, and document workflows. Reduces manual processing time by up to 90%.
- [API Integrations](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/api-integrations): RESTful API development, GraphQL, webhooks, and enterprise system integrations that unify Salesforce, Shopify, HubSpot, Google Workspace, and custom databases into a single operational layer.
- [Custom Software Development](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/software-development): Full-stack SaaS platforms, enterprise applications, and internal tools built with React, Node.js, Python, and cloud-native architectures. Scalable, secure, and optimized for performance.
- [Mobile App Development](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/mobile-app-development): Cross-platform iOS and Android applications using React Native and native development. High-performance apps designed to scale with business requirements.
- [Cybersecurity & Compliance](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/cybersecurity): Penetration testing, risk assessments, vulnerability scanning, and compliance audits aligned with NIST Cybersecurity Framework, CIS Controls, HIPAA, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and GDPR. Ethical hacking, SIEM monitoring, and incident response planning.
- [Cloud Infrastructure Management](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/cloud-systems): Cloud architecture design and management across AWS, Azure, and hybrid environments. Kubernetes orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, DevOps automation, infrastructure-as-code, and 24/7 monitoring with cost optimization.
- [Data Management & Analytics](https://autom8ionlab.com/solutions/data-management): Centralized data pipelines, AI-powered dashboards, business intelligence platforms, and predictive analytics. Transforms raw data into actionable insights for strategic decision-making.

## Pricing

Most projects range from $15,000 to $150,000 depending on complexity, integration requirements, and scale. Clients routinely achieve ROI exceeding the initial investment within 90 days.

## Results

- 60-90% reduction in manual tasks through intelligent automation
- 300% improvement in data processing speed
- 10x productivity gains within 90 days of deployment
- 80% reduction in support ticket volume via AI agents
- 3-5x accuracy improvement in domain-specific AI queries vs. generic solutions
- Custom builds typically launch within 30 days

## Differentiators

- Purpose-built systems, not generic software or duct-taped integrations
- Integrates with existing tech stacks (Salesforce, Shopify, legacy systems) without replacement
- Full data sovereignty with on-premises and private cloud deployment options
- Enterprise-grade security: bank-level encryption, SOC 2-aligned protocols
- Transparent fine-tuning processes with explainable AI

## Industries Served

Technology companies, construction, healthcare, financial services, manufacturing, legal and professional services, e-commerce, and any organization with repetitive workflows or complex data management needs.

## Technology Stack

AI/ML: GPT-4, Claude, open-source LLMs, RAG systems, RLHF fine-tuning, TensorFlow, PyTorch
Automation: n8n, Make, custom Python, RPA frameworks
Cloud: AWS, Azure, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines
Development: React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, TypeScript, PostgreSQL
Security: NIST CSF, CIS Controls, SIEM platforms, Metasploit, OWASP methodology

## FAQ

**Q: How is custom automation different from Zapier or Make?**
A: Zapier and Make work for simple connections but break when business logic gets complex. We build custom systems engineered for your specific workflows, edge cases, and scale requirements. You get a purpose-built solution instead of duct-taped integrations.

**Q: How long does it take to build?**
A: Most custom builds launch within 30 days. Process: Technical Discovery (Days 1-3) → Architecture & Scope (Days 4-7) → System Build & Integration (Days 8-25) → Launch & Performance Tuning (Days 26-30+).

**Q: What does it cost?**
A: Projects typically range from $15,000 to $150,000. Most clients see ROI exceeding the investment within 90 days through reduced operational overhead and productivity gains.

**Q: Is our data secure?**
A: Yes. Enterprise-grade security with bank-level encryption, SOC 2-aligned protocols, and complete data sovereignty. Can deploy on-premises or private cloud with full control over your data.

**Q: Do you integrate with existing systems?**
A: We specialize in integrating with existing tech stacks—Salesforce, Shopify, custom databases, legacy systems—without requiring you to replace what's working.

**Q: What makes your AI agents different from generic chatbots?**
A: Our agents are fine-tuned on your specific business data, product catalogs, and customer history. They understand your industry terminology, maintain context across sessions, and adapt rather than follow scripts.

## Blog Articles

Long-form technical guides on secure AI deployment, NIST AI RMF, CMMC 2.0 compliance, and local LLM architecture for regulated industries.

### CMMC & Defense Compliance
- [AI-Driven Evidence: Automating Your CMMC Audit Without the Hallucinations](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/ai-driven-evidence-automating-cmmc-audit-without-hallucinations): How human-in-the-loop AI bound to live configs collapses 18 months of CMMC evidence collection into a continuous, real-time process — without False Claims Act exposure.
- [From Zero to CMMC Ready: Can AI Really Shrink Your 12-Month Timeline to 30 Days?](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/from-zero-to-cmmc-ready-ai-30-day-timeline): The 4-week roadmap that uses secure AI enclaves, FIPS-validated infrastructure-as-code, and AI-drafted SSPs to take defense contractors from zero to C3PAO-ready in 30 days.
- [Local LLMs vs. CMMC Level 2: Why Going Custom Is the Only Way to Pass Your C3PAO Assessment](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/local-llms-vs-cmmc-level-2-c3pao-assessment): Why "FedRAMP Moderate" cloud AI is a trap, how local LLMs simplify your CUI boundary, and what C3PAO assessors actually look for across NIST 800-171 AC, AU, and CM control families.
- [Stop Pasting CUI Into ChatGPT: A Defense Contractor's Guide to Secure, Compliant AI](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/stop-pasting-cui-into-chatgpt-defense-contractor-guide): Why pasting CUI into a public LLM violates DFARS 252.204-7012 and kills CMMC certification, plus the 30-day path from shadow AI to a local, audit-ready stack.
- [The CMMC 2.0 AI Paradox: How Innovation Could Kill Your Certification (and How to Fix It)](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/cmmc-20-ai-paradox-innovation-certification-fix): Resolving the AI-versus-CMMC paradox with FIPS 140-2 boundaries, IAM/SIEM integration, and containerized local LLMs deployed inside Azure Government or AWS GovCloud.

### AI Security & Strategy
- [From Audit to 10x ROI: Our 30-Day Blueprint for Security-First AI Automation](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/from-audit-to-10x-roi-30-day-blueprint-security-first-ai-automation): The 30-day NIST-aligned blueprint we use to deploy security-first AI automation that delivers measurable 10x ROI for healthcare and tech operations teams.
- [Local LLMs vs. The Cloud: Keeping Your Business Logic Under Bank-Level Encryption](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/local-llms-vs-cloud-bank-level-encryption-business-logic): Why public cloud LLMs are a black box and how local LLMs combined with AES-256 encryption give you 2026-grade AI performance with full data sovereignty.
- [Shadow AI Is Quietly Killing Your Security: How to Audit and Reclaim Your Data Privacy](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/shadow-ai-killing-security-audit-reclaim-data-privacy): The 3-step Shadow AI audit (network analysis, identity review, data sensitivity mapping) and the secure-by-design replacement system, mapped to SOC 2, HIPAA, and GDPR.
- [The NIST AI RMF Awareness Gap: Why Most Healthcare Founders Are Already Behind on Compliance](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/nist-ai-rmf-awareness-gap-healthcare-founders-compliance): Why only 12% of U.S. hospitals have implemented an AI governance framework — and the 30-day blueprint that puts your healthcare org in the safe minority via NIST RMF Govern/Map/Measure/Manage.
- [Why "Plug-and-Play" AI Is a Liability: Using the NIST Framework to Build Secure Agents](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/plug-and-play-ai-liability-nist-framework-secure-agents): How GPT-wrapper templates trade control for speed, why off-the-shelf bots fail HIPAA and SOC 2 audits, and how the NIST AI RMF turns brittle plug-and-play tools into hardened agents.

### Earlier Reading
- [AI Agents vs. Traditional Workflow Automation in 2026](https://autom8ionlab.com/blog/ai-agents-vs-traditional-workflow-automation-2026): Practical comparison with performance data on when to choose AI agents over rule-based workflow automation.
